title: Ex-Offender Reentry Programs * Native American Community - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Employment > Ex-Offender Reentry Programs * Native American Community 1 Matching Service Providers The mapped locations are estimates, for the exact location of an individual site, select "More Details" Refine Results - Select - No Filter Native American Community Women Accessibility Options - Select - No Filter Wheelchair Access (Full) Wheelchair Access (Partial) Accessible Parking (Private Lot) Accessible Parking (Nearby Public/Street Parking) Accessible Restrooms Alternative Communication Formats Virtual Service Options Staff Trained in Disability Awareness Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF MEDICINE WHEEL RECOVERY SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides outpatient services including alcohol and drug treatment, co-occurring disorder care, DUI programming, gambling treatment, mental health counseling, and cultural activities, with cultural and spiritual wellness guiding all service planning. Services include assessments, individual and group therapy, and crisis and safety planning, with referrals to community partners for medication management or specialized mental health needs. Works with community agencies to support participants involved in courts and social service systems, helping with re-entry and reducing barriers related to housing, employment, education, stigma, and rebuilding trust. Offers recidivism risk assessments, Rent Well classes, life-skills and employment readiness groups, parenting support, resource navigation, and volunteer opportunities. 58147 Columbia River Highway Suite C Saint Helens, OR 97051 Eligibility: Age 18 and older. Provides culturally specific services for the Native American community. Some services are gender-specific, while other services are co-ed. Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm DUII treatment: Monday-Friday 2pm-5pm Email (503) 396-5322 Get Directions Visit Website More Details MEDICINE WHEEL RECOVERY SERVICES MEDICINE WHEEL RECOVERY SERVICES
